description: Building heatmap visualizer to statistically determine regressions and improvements across 300+ software and hardware builds.
Implementing unsupervised time-series anomaly detection and root cause analysis across hardware data from 200+ devices.
Built an agentic AI orchestration on AWS to automate CDN deployments across 20+ global regions.
Enabled safe, human-in-the-loop traffic shifts at 300K+ TPM in under 10 minutes with GenAI monitoring and validation.
Reduced deployment time by 59% and cut potential human error points by 82%, improving production reliability.

experiences.company: Berkeley AI Research – Berkeley Speech Group
description: Authored paper accepted to ACL 2026 showing Evolutionary Strategies induce catastrophic forgetting vs. GRPO via denser weight updates and higher ℓ₂ norms.
Fine-tuned 9 Qwen3 reasoning models with GRPO and ES, improving faithfulness metrics from 80% to 88%; contributed to the open-source VERL RL library.
Building AlphaEvolve-style continual learning harnesses to surpass SOTA on open mathematical problems via inference-time training.
Implemented PUCT-based tree search sampler enabling LLMs to continuously evolve programs across a structured search tree.

experiences.company: UCSF Weill Institute for Neurosciences – Chen Lab
description: Employed signal processing methods (Wavelet Transform, Fourier Analysis) with SciPy for EEG feature extraction.
Engineered seizure detection pipeline with EEG time series using SVM and GMM models; achieved 95% accuracy.
Trained a Keypoint MoSeq pipeline for unsupervised learning on rodent movement detection.
Optimized memory usage in a seizure-detection Python library from 200GB+ down to 4GB via chunking.
